creator: freebsd@chrisoneill.co.uk
text:
Whilst updating Erlang:


===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
===>  Found saved configuration for erlang-r13b04_2,1
=> otp_doc_html_R14B01.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles//erlang.
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.erlang.org/download/.
fetch: http://www.erlang.org/download/otp_doc_html_R14B01.tar.gz: Requested Range Not Satisfiable
=> Attempting to fetch from http://erlang.stacken.kth.se/download/.
fetch: http://erlang.stacken.kth.se/download/otp_doc_html_R14B01.tar.gz: Not Found
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.csd.uu.se/ftp/mirror/erlang/download/.
fetch: http://www.csd.uu.se/ftp/mirror/erlang/download/otp_doc_html_R14B01.tar.gz: Moved Permanently
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/distfiles/erlang/.
fetch: otp_doc_html_R14B01.tar.gz: local file (28573605 bytes) is longer than remote file (28332965 bytes)
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles//erlang and try again.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/erlang.
*** Error code 1
